pages.text: midnight veto Impact Report ’24
Our mission is to accelerate the world’s transition to sustainable energy 2
Everything we do is in support of our mission 3 Impact Report 2024

Pollution emitted during the burning of fossil fuels leads to premature deaths globally each year. That accounts for one in five premature deaths worldwide. Our zero direct-emission products contribute less climate-warming carbon and less fine particulate pollution into the Earth’s atmosphere. Each year, about people die in traffic accidents globally, with traffic injuries being the leading cause of death for children and young adults between the ages of 5 and 29. Autonomous transportation will make our roads safer for drivers, passengers and pedestrians alike. Optimus, our autonomous humanoid robot, will give people back more time to do impactful work and enjoy their lives by automating time-consuming, unsafe and repetitive tasks at work and in the home. 8 million 1.19 million We believe autonomy will save lives, time and money while improving quality of life for everyone. Creating a safer, cleaner, more enjoyable world 4 Impact Report 2024

Tesla Virtual Power Plant (VPP) In 2024, Tesla VPPs delivered of energy to the grid, supplied by over enrolled Powerwall units globally—that is the equivalent of powering 742 Model Y vehicles for one year. Puerto Rico’s energy infrastructure faces regular weather-related grid disturbances. In 2024, Tesla’s Puerto Rico VPP supported Powerwall-enabled homes, contributing of energy to the grid and offsetting peak demand during summer heat waves. 2.8 GWh 100,000 7,112 444 MWh Megapack Industrial Energy Storage In Australia’s National Electricity Market, Megapack and Powerpack sites responded during contingency events in the fourth quarter of 2024, providing grid stability and avoiding blackouts. Megapacks on Oahu supported the retirement of Hawaii's last coal plant. The Kapolei Energy Storage facility can support roughly of the island's peak load and will reduce renewable energy curtailment by over the next five years. 16 20% 69% Grid stability in action 26 Impact Report 2024
